title: Sunday Market at Botanical Garden tomorrow
description: GEORGE NEWS - The Sunday Market at the...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The Sunday Market at the George Botanical Garden will be held tomorrow, Sunday 13 July and will as usual be a delightful day for the whole family.

It starts at 10:00 and concludes at 14:00. Entry is free.


> Visitors can enjoy a festive atmosphere with over 30 craft stalls, food vendors with mouth-watering eats, and live music by Skye Gypsy. There will be a jumping castle and fun Tjoe Tjoe Train rides, making it a perfect family outing.


Hosted in the lush surroundings of the Botanical Garden, the event is a celebration of local creativity, community spirit, and nature.

Urgent appeal for wheel barrows

The Friends of the Botanical Garden have issued an urgent appeal: the garden is in desperate need of wheelbarrows - ideally four or five - to assist with moving compost, mulch, and plants essential to the upkeep of this cherished space.


> Christiaan Viljoen from Friends of the Botanical Garden said the plastic-binned wheelbarrows are best as they don’t rust, but they cost around R2 000 each. "At this point, we’ll gratefully accept any usable wheelbarrow, new or second-hand.”


Donors are reminded that the garden can issue Section 18A tax certificates for contributions.

Help the garden thrive by supporting their market day.

For donations or more information, contact Christiaan Viljoen on 083 703 9482.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
